summary: A good‑sounding audience recording captured from the FOH desk; it shines with a slight boost to volume and bass.
review: The single fan review gives the tape a solid 4‑star rating, noting that despite being an audience source it sounds great when the volume is turned up and the bass is emphasized. Technical details confirm it was recorded on Scheops CMC4/mK4 capsules feeding a Sony PCM‑F1 at the front‑of‑house position. No specific musical commentary is provided, so the show's performance quality remains unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive 4‑star audience review highlights good sound with minor EQ tweaks; limited commentary on the music keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: FOH audience capture using Scheops CMC4/mK4 capsules into a Sony PCM‑F1; clear enough but benefits from increased volume and bass boost.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details were mentioned in the reviews.
